name: Eastern Silk Industries Limited
summary: Eastern Silk Industries Limited manufactures and sells textile and allied products in India. It provides silk yarns, fabrics and made-ups, home furnishings, scarves, laces, and belts, as well as fashion, handloom, embroidered, and double width fabrics. The company also exports its products to the United States, Europe, Australia, the Middle East, Canada, Japan, New Zealand, Scandinavian, and EFFTA countries. Eastern Silk Industries Limited was incorporated in 1946 and is based in Kolkata, India.
